hero.name: Likhith M
hero.title: Electrical Engineer | ML & AI Enthusiast
hero.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of Machine Learning and Electrical Engineering.

about.description: I'm a pre-final year Electrical Engineering student with a Minor in Computer Science and a deep passion for Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence. I enjoy bridging the gap between hardware and intelligent software — from designing control systems to building ML pipelines that solve real-world problems. I've worked on projects spanning computer vision, signal processing, and predictive modelling, and I'm always looking for opportunities to apply engineering principles to data-driven challenges.
highlights: 🎓 B.Tech in Electrical Engineering & Minor in Computer Science

projects.title: Solar Panel Remaining Useful Life (RUL) Prediction
projects.description: Developed an ML pipeline to predict the remaining useful life of solar panels using time-series data and regression models. Implemented feature engineering and model evaluation techniques to improve prediction accuracy.

projects.title: AI Study Companion – RAG Chatbot
projects.description: Designed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline for academic PDF Q&A, leveraging embedding models and ChromaDB for high-precision semantic vector search and document retrieval.

projects.title: B-FIT: Fitness Tracking Web App
projects.description: Developed a web application for tracking fitness activities with a MERN stack architecture enabling user workout logging and performance tracking.

experience.description: Built a Smart Hospital Management System (MERN stack) with real-time ambulance tracking, doctor booking, and prescription management for 200+ records.
